title: Cyperus micromelas
taxonomy: Cyperus micromelas is classified within the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. This family is part of the larger order Poales, which also includes grasses and other flowering plants. The order Poales is a part of the clade commelinids, a group of monocots that also includes the families Juncaceae and Bromeliaceae. Cyperus micromelas is a species of sedge, and its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in this group. Understanding the classification of Cyperus micromelas can provide insights into its characteristics, habitat, and ecological role.
